sourceOfTruth: backend/src/middleware/rbac.ts (permission enforcement + ORG_OWNER/ORG_ADMIN implicit bypass allowlist)

notes: Implicit full access to all resources/actions (hasImplicitFullAccess).
Data scoping must still be enforced by organizationContext/branch guards and controller where-clauses.
Bypasses permission checks ONLY for org-owned resources listed in ORG_ADMIN_IMPLICIT_RESOURCES.
Must be scoped to resolved organization by organizationContext and controller scoping.
Same permissions bypass behavior as ORG_OWNER for org-owned resources.
Owner-only constraints (if any) are enforced in controllers (e.g., cannot modify ORG_OWNER in staff management).
Represents staff permissions when assigned the SYSTEM_ROLES.STAFF role (or equivalent custom roles).
Branch access must be limited to assigned branches via requireBranchAccess / controller filters.
If userType has no defaults (e.g. EMPLOYEE), then roles define permissions entirely.
Uses DEFAULT_PERMISSIONS.BRANCH_ADMIN plus any assigned role permissions.
Branch access should be limited to assigned branches.

ORG_OWNER.orgOwnedResources: ALL ACTIONS for resources in ORG_ADMIN_IMPLICIT_RESOURCES (see backend/src/middleware/rbac.ts)

platformOnlyResources.push_notifications: DENY unless explicitly granted by role permissions
platformOnlyResources.policies: DENY unless explicitly granted by role permissions

ORG_ADMIN.orgOwnedResources: ALL ACTIONS for resources in ORG_ADMIN_IMPLICIT_RESOURCES (see backend/src/middleware/rbac.ts)

platformOnlyResources.push_notifications: DENY unless explicitly granted by role permissions
platformOnlyResources.policies: DENY unless explicitly granted by role permissions

notes: Within-org operations must be scoped by organizationContext + branch org validation.
Staff management routes should be org-scoped; owner-only constraints are allowed.
Must be org-scoped. STAFF/BRANCH_ADMIN limited to assigned branches.
Must be org-scoped. STAFF/BRANCH_ADMIN limited to assigned branches.
Org-scoped resources; SUPER_ADMIN requires explicit org selection.
Org settings endpoints should enforce URL :id matches selected org for SUPER_ADMIN.
Hero sections should be org-scoped; public active hero can fall back to global.
